Tip of the day
Skill levels exceeding an activity's main skill requirement gives +1.25% extra Work efficiency for what you're doing, up to 20 levels.

Boxtrap

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Other languages:

Boxtrap
Type: Material
Value: 1
Fine Value: 11
Keyword: Hunting trap
Search
Keyword: 		Hunting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A quickly assembled boxtrap that can be deployed easily to allow the capture of smaller creatures before it falls apart afterwards.

The Boxtrap item is a material.

Requirement

  • At least Hunting lvl. 40.

Attributes (Input)

Quality Attributes

Global +40% Work efficiency
Global +200% Fine material finding
Global +10% Double rewards
Global +100% Bonus experience

Uses

Activity Input

Boxtrap is used as a required input for the following activity:

Activity Name Location Requirement Note
Box trapping Tendon Wet Fields in Wallisia Needs 1x Hunting trap This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft a boxtrap

You quickly assemble a box trap that is made strong enough to capture small creatures before it falls apart.

Build a boxtrap designed for trapping small prey once before breaking.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft a boxtrap Carpentry lvl. 35 None 2x Birch plank or 2x Pine plank or 2x Spruce plank or
2x Oak plank or 2x Maple plank or 2x Teak plank or
2x Willow plank		 1x Boxtrap
Recipe Experience
Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.
Craft a boxtrap 26 56 0.464 32 steps 175% 0.812 240 steps
Additional Recipe Outputs
Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Carpentry chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 14,000 steps 8,000 steps

Crafting Flow

Birch plankPine plankSpruce plankOak plankMaple plankTeak plankWillow plank
